relations.subject: Rufous coucal
relations.evidence: It is found in Luzon and proximate islands in the Philippines

relations.subject: Rufous coucal

relations.subject: Rufous coucal
relations.evidence: There are no known targeted conservation actions for this bird, but it will indirectly benefit from the conservation of other North Luzon species like the Critically Endangered Isabela oriole. It occurs in a few protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and Bataan National Park but despite this legal protection, enforcement is lax and these areas continue to be deforested

relations.subject: Rufous coucal
relations.evidence: There are no known targeted conservation actions for this bird, but it will indirectly benefit from the conservation of other North Luzon species like the Critically Endangered Isabela oriole. It occurs in a few protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and Bataan National Park but despite this legal protection, enforcement is lax and these areas continue to be deforested

relations.subject: Rufous coucal
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Rufous coucal
relations.evidence: Its threats are mainly habitat loss due to deforestation for lumber, mining and farmlands
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
